## Summary

<!-- What skill(s) does this add or change? -->

## Checklist

- [ ] Skill folder follows `catalog/<Lane>/<Category>/skills/<name>/` convention
- [ ] `manifest.json` present and valid
- [ ] `SKILL.md` frontmatter (`name`, `description`, `compatibility`) present
- [ ] `SKILL.md` includes all required sections (see `CONTRIBUTING.md`)
- [ ] `description` follows `USE FOR / DO NOT USE FOR / INVOKES` pattern
- [ ] Entry added to `catalog/skills.json`
- [ ] `python3 scripts/validate_catalog.py` passes locally
- [ ] No PMCR-O role names (Orchestrator/Planner/Maker/Checker/Reflector) packaged as skills
